component_family: Japan original 3 mm non-polar tungsten filament lamp
source_status: user-provided listing and dimensions; verify against physical sample before volume use
listing_text: 5v 400 ma (10个)日本原装 2W 5V 400mA 无极性3mm钨丝灯泡 暖黄色光小灯珠

pcb_assumptions.board_style: 24 mm round carrier matching the existing LED/tungsten carrier family
pcb_assumptions.mounting: four M2 NPTH holes on 12 x 12 mm pattern
pcb_assumptions.external_connector: rear-side 1x02 2.54 mm horizontal pin header footprint
pcb_assumptions.surface_finish: auto for JLC China; small 24 mm board usually uses lead-free HASL instead of OSP
pcb_assumptions.copper: 1 oz is sufficient for 400 mA on short traces; neck-down at lamp pads is 0.3 mm
pcb_assumptions.thermal_warning: 2 W tungsten lamp still runs hot; verify FR4 temperature, lamp standoff, and airflow.

manufacturing_sources.title: JLCPCB via design guidance
manufacturing_sources.used_for: 0.3 mm and larger holes are easier; minimum mechanical drill increments and slot notes.

manufacturing_sources.title: JLCPCB hole-size pitfall note
manufacturing_sources.used_for: Small-hole warning; standard 0.3 mm hole guidance and slot cautions.
